title: How to get formula to only show right date format?
excerpt:
Hello all! 
I have this formula (attached) to show the date 90 days from the close date of a deal. Instead of this long date format with irrelevant info how can I get the date formatted to look like the Actual Close Date…

posts.author: gracemeyer (Grace Meyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all!

I have this formula (attached) to show the date 90 days from the close date of a deal. Instead of this long date format with irrelevant info how can I get the date formatted to look like the Actual Close Date column?

Screenshot 2025-02-07 at 9.49.36 AM1182×244 12.9 KB

Thanks in Advance!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Try this FORMAT_DATE(ADD_DAYS({Actual Close Date}, 90), “MMM DD, YYYY”)
